classification.cautionReason: Valued early Christian text, but not part of the biblical canon for mainstream Christian denominations.

lineage: Commandment First. On Faith in God.

ccel.title: ANF02. Fathers of the Second Century: Hermas, Tatian, Athenagoras, Theophilus, and Clement of Alexandria (Entire)

source.title: ANF02. Fathers of the Second Century: Hermas, Tatian, Athenagoras, Theophilus, and Clement of Alexandria (Entire)

title: Commandment First. On Faith in God.

source.title: ANF02. Fathers of the Second Century: Hermas, Tatian, Athenagoras, Theophilus, and Clement of Alexandria (Entire)

verses.text: First of all, believe that there is one God who created and finished all things, and made all things out of nothing.
He alone is able to contain the whole, but Himself cannot be contained.
Have faith therefore in Him, and fear Him; and fearing Him, exercise self-control.
Keep these commands, and you will cast away from you all wickedness, and put on the strength of righteousness, and live to God, if you keep this commandment.
